title: Zephyr announce scheduler (periodic TX)
description:
Implement announce scheduler for Zephyr.

Python reference: python/src/lichen/announce/scheduler.py (303 LoC)

The Zephyr announce.c has the RX path (ingest, sig verify, peer tracking) but is missing the TX path.

Required functionality:
- Periodic announce transmission (spec 9.4: 300s interval)
- Random jitter (0-30s) using k_timer or k_delayed_work
- Sequence number management (16-bit, wrapping)
- Persistence to flash for seq_num (production requirement)
- Integration with link layer for transmission

Note: Zephyr already has peer tracking and signature verification in announce.c.
close_reason: Implemented: Added announce scheduler for Zephyr with periodic TX (spec 9.4). Features: k_work_delayable-based scheduling with 300s interval + 0-30s jitter, 16-bit wrapping sequence number with persistence callback, SYS_INIT for static initialization, thread-safe via k_mutex. API: lichen_announce_sched_start/stop, set/get_seq, send_now, set_app_data. Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_ANNOUNCE_SCHEDULER with INTERVAL_MS, JITTER_MS, INITIAL_DELAY_MS.
